title: Nametags++
description: Nametag plugin who allows you to change the tag above your head and tablist
body:
# Nametags++
The Nametags plugin is a tool that allows you to fully manage the display of players' prefix,suffix etc. above their heads in the game. Thanks to this plugin, you can customize the appearance of nametags, their colors, fonts, additional information and other details that allow you to personalize the way players see each other.

Supported APIs: **EssentialsX, PlaceHolderAPI**

Supported versions: **1.13.x - 1.21.x**  _**(RGB nametags works only on versions 1.16+)**_

**/tag <player> prefix <tag>** - Changes your prefix above the head

**/tag <player> suffix <tag>** - Changes your suffix above the head

**/tag <player> silentprefix <tag>** - allows you to set a prefix without any information in the chat

**/tag <player> subtitle <tag>** - allows you to set text next to the player's number of lives

**/tag <player> rgbsubtitle <tag>** - allows you to set rgb text next to the player's number of lives

**/tag <player> silentsuffix <tag>** - allows you to set a suffix without any information in the chat

**/tag <player> rgbprefix <tag>** - allows you to set a prefix with a gradient (e.g. &#HEXCOLOR...) [**1.16+**]

**/tag <player> rgbsuffix <tag>** - allows you to set a suffix with a gradient (e.g. &#HEXCOLOR...) [**1.16+**]

**/tag <player> <prefix/suffix/silentprefix/silentsuffix/rgbprefix/rgbsuffix/subtitle/rgbsubtitle> reset** - Reset your prefix/suffix above the head

**/tag <player> luckperms-sync** - Synchronizes the prefix and suffix from the luckperms group and adds them to the nametags (To use color, use § instead of &)

**/tag luckperms-autosync** - Synchronizes the prefix and suffix just like the /tag <player> luckperms-sync command, but it does it automatically every 5 seconds and for every online player

**/tags reload** - Reload the plugin

**/tag reload** - Reload the plugin

### Permissions:

**staff.settag**

**staff.reloadtags**

### Showcase:
![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84d6186a403cf4f5431fd08ef9b7a5cf220f61cd_0.webp)
